text.title: surveys Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the surveys methodology end-to-end.

step.name: frame-question
step.action: State research question as one sentence. Pick standard instrument.

step.name: design-items
step.action: Author items; apply no-double-barrel, no-leading-wording, ordinal-labels-disclosed rules.

step.name: sampling-and-channel-plan
step.action: Set sample size, channel mix, fielding window, response-rate target.

step.name: pre-register-analysis
step.action: Pre-declare cross-tabs, weighting, significance tests in the config.

step.name: field-and-analyze
step.action: Field via tool; on close, run pre-registered analysis. Report response rate alongside results.
